text.title: Trade-off Decision Methods Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all four prerequisites populated (question, shortlist, uncertainty, breadth)?

text.example: Decision: 'adopt service-mesh vs API-gateway for cross-cluster traffic'. Profile: 3 attributes (perf + sec + ops), cross-team, medium uncertainty. r1 default matrix; r2 escalation: multi-attribute conflict → ATAM. Run ATAM; utility tree produced. ADR-METH-006 Accepted, review trigger = traffic volume × 3 OR new mesh entrant changes operational maturity score.
